coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 

COMMENT: 
This variable was only populated from 2007–2012. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount 
rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding 
coinsurance variable called (PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_OS). 
The CCW
